description_for_human: Search 364M+ Shopify products by keyword, brand, and price.
description_for_model: Search across 364M+ indexed Shopify products. Supports full-text search by keyword, brand/vendor filtering, and USD price range filtering. Returns product title, brand, URL, image, price, and currency. Use when the user asks about e-commerce products, product research, competitor pricing, market analysis, or finding items on Shopify stores.
